title: Spicy Velvety British Tofu Ploughman's
description: A twist on the classic British ploughman's, with silken tofu adding a rich and creamy texture, and a kick of heat from the chilli flakes.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the curry powder, chilli flakes, salt and black pepper to make the spice blend.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, garlic and ginger to make the oil infusion.
Add the tofu to the spice blend and toss to coat evenly.
Pour the oil infusion over the tofu and toss again to coat.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the tofu to the pan and cook for 5 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Meanwhile, toast the bread slices until lightly browned.
To assemble the ploughman's, place a slice of toasted bread on a plate, top with a spoonful of the tofu, some sliced cucumber and a sprinkle of cheese.
Repeat for the remaining ingredients and serve immediately.
